meta.name: AI System Pipeline
meta.description: End-to-end prompt routing, evaluation, and response pipeline for Prompt Lab and related AI tooling.
meta.author: Dave Robertson

meta.desc: React-based Prompt Lab interface. Captures user input, displays enhanced prompts, variants, and evaluation results.
Central dispatch. Routes enhancement requests to the correct provider based on user selection and mode.
risks: Single point of failure for all enhancement requests
Provider fallback logic not yet implemented
nextMoves: Add provider health check before dispatch
Implement fallback chain: primary → secondary → error

meta.desc: localStorage-backed library of saved prompts, variants, notes, and tags. Supports collections and search.
Core prompt improvement logic. Applies mode-specific system prompts (Balanced, Claude, ChatGPT, Image, Code, Concise, Detailed) with INTENT_POLICY guardrails.
risks: Structured intermediate objects can leak into output

meta.desc: Anthropic Claude models. Primary enhancement provider. Supports XML-structured prompts natively.
GPT-4/o models. Secondary provider. System/user message structure, chain-of-thought prompting.
Google Gemini models. Third provider option. Can produce structured JSON output but sometimes over-structures.
risks: More likely to return nested objects in enhanced field

meta.desc: Parses raw provider response into structured enhancement object. Handles JSON extraction, markdown stripping, and fallback parsing.
risks: Some providers wrap JSON in markdown code fences
Partial JSON responses cause silent failures

meta.desc: coercePromptText + normalizeParsedPayload. Ensures enhanced output is always plain text strings, not structured objects or JSON strings.
nextMoves: Add assumption audit for Track A

meta.desc: Planned evaluation engine. Will score enhanced prompts against original intent, check for assumption injection, and flag over-steering.
Curated set of seed prompts with expected enhancement outcomes. Used to regression-test the enhancement engine across modes.
localStorage record of enhancement runs. Stores original, enhanced, variants, notes, assumptions, and provider metadata per run.
Renders enhanced prompts, variants, diff views, assumption badges, and copy-to-clipboard in the UI.
API keys, model selections, and provider-specific settings stored in localStorage. Synced to GitHub Pages provider options page.
Shared policy string prepended to all mode system prompts. Guards against medium/audience/tone invention. Defined in constants.js.
